_comment: Tests node 1 routing for Meraki Holistic Health (gentle formal tone): booking routes to book_intent, info routes silently to info_pivot, symptom-only routes silently to book_intent.

scenarios.name: Booking intent routes to book_intent with gentle formal ack

history.content: I'd like to book an appointment

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks one gentle formal ack ('Lovely!' / 'Wonderful!' / 'How lovely!') then calls universal_router intent='book_intent'. FAIL if agent uses Aussie slang ('No worries!'), asks what service, or omits the tool call.

scenarios.name: Info question routes silently to info_pivot
scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_pivot' with zero spoken output and system__message_to_speak empty. FAIL if agent quotes prices inline.

scenarios.name: Symptom-only description routes silently to book_intent with complaint captured

history.content: I've been having really bad neck pain for a few weeks

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='book_intent' with caller_complaint='neck pain' (or similar) and zero spoken output. FAIL if agent routes to info_pivot or speaks a spoken ack before routing.

scenarios.name: LEAVE MESSAGE known-caller skips name question

history.content: DV state at call start: caller_first_name='Amelia', patient_name_raw='' (empty)
Uh, I want to speak to someone.
I'm not able to transfer your call to reception, but I can pass on a message for them to call you back. What would you like me to tell them?
I'd like to pick up some Chinese herbs that Casey could make up for me.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='leave_message' with caller_name='Amelia' (from caller_first_name DV) WITHOUT asking 'And can I get your name?' — caller_first_name is already set so name is known. FAIL if agent asks 'And can I get your name?' when caller_first_name='Amelia' is pre-set.

scenarios.name: Rambling hesitant caller with embedded insurance question (real-call regression)

history.content: Hi, um, my name is Ben. Um, I wanna-- I was referred by one of your patients, uh, Henry. Uh, yeah, I just wanna give it a try. I'm just wondering how, how you charge. Um, I've got a Bupa. I'm with a Bupa insurance. Um...

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='info_pivot' with zero spoken output (system__message_to_speak empty). FAIL if agent produces any spoken filler (e.g. 'Mm-hmm'), asks a clarifying question instead of routing, or fails to call any tool.
